reviews.comment:
Normal como parador de ruta. Considerando que es el primer signo de vida luego de atravesar la Ruta del Desierto, es un oasis. Sólo conozco la estación de servicio y el bar. El hotel del otro lado de la rotonda parece aceptable.

(Translated by Google)
It's a typical roadside stop. Considering it's the first sign of life after crossing the Desert Route, it's a welcome oasis. I've only ever been to the gas station and the bar. The hotel on the other side of the roundabout seems acceptable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbm9uWVVREAE

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:
exasperante lentitud para atender, muy lentos tanto los playeros como en el minishop,nunca vi una gasolinera que pare de atender tanto tiempo en los cambios de turno, ademas suelen sufrir faltas de combustibles

(Translated by Google)
The service is exasperatingly slow; both the attendants and the convenience store staff are incredibly slow. I've never seen a gas station take so long to serve customers during shift changes. They also frequently experience fuel shortages.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROGRTaTJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, bastante rápida para la cantidad de autos que suele haber. Buenos precios y calidad.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, fairly quick for the number of cars usually present. Good prices and quality.
